Mercury in 2nd to the Sun indicates the father to be a shop keeper.
The native will be intelligent and will study upto his 25-27th year. As

IMPORTANT CHARTS 59
Mercury comes across Rahu before touching the Moon, there will be breaks
in education; but he will complete it.
Saturn with Ketu in Capricorn and Venus in the next house indicate
roaring trade in wine and other costly drinks from about 27th year. About 28th
he will get married. The partner will be well built and beautiful.
